# FusionSales.ai

> FusionSales.ai builds custom software — CRMs, quote generators, scheduling, and workflow automation — for mid-sized businesses that have outgrown off-the-shelf tools. The pitch: stop renting your software and start owning it. Custom builds ship in weeks (not the year a traditional dev shop took) at a fraction of historical cost, because expert teams paired with AI now build 5–10x faster. A division of Arlogix Inc.

## About

- [Home](https://fusionsales.ai/): What FusionSales builds and why custom software is now within reach for mid-sized businesses. Includes an interactive industry-specific quote-tool demo and a live ROI calculator.
- [What we build](https://fusionsales.ai/#build): Quote & estimate generators, custom CRMs, scheduling tools, project/order tracking, automated workflows, real-time dashboards.
- [Recent work](https://fusionsales.ai/#work): Production builds across sales ops, enterprise comms, behavioral-health credentialing, executive recruiting, beverage retail, and recycling marketplaces.
- [Pricing](https://fusionsales.ai/#pricing): Transparent one-time builds — Starter ~$15k, Core $35k–75k, Enterprise $100k–150k — plus optional ongoing optimization.

## Assessment tools (free, interactive)

- [Operational Efficiency Scorecard](https://fusionsales.ai/tools/efficiency-scorecard): 10-question diagnostic that grades a business A–F on operational efficiency and surfaces its biggest workflow leaks.
- [Manual Work Cost Calculator](https://fusionsales.ai/tools/manual-work-cost): Calculates the annual and 3-year cost of manual work (labor + errors) and the payback period against a custom build.
- [Build vs. Buy Decision Tool](https://fusionsales.ai/tools/build-vs-buy): Six questions that return a clear buy / customize / build recommendation with reasoning.
- [Tech Stack Health Check](https://fusionsales.ai/tools/tech-stack-health-check): Audits a software stack for sprawl, integration gaps, spreadsheet risk, and consolidation opportunities, with a health grade.

## Insights — core ideas

- [The Future Belongs to Companies That Design Their Own Tools](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/the-future-belongs-to-companies-that-design-their-own-tools): The flagship thesis — owning the tools your business runs on is the defining advantage of the next decade.
- [Why Custom Software Is No Longer Just for Enterprise](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/why-custom-software-is-no-longer-just-for-enterprise): How AI and expert teams collapsed the cost of custom software by ~90%.
- [What "Owning Your Software" Actually Means](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/what-owning-your-software-actually-means): Ownership is concrete — the code, the data, and the roadmap are yours.
- [Build vs. Buy: How to Know Which Path Is Right](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/build-vs-buy-how-to-know-which-path): Three numbers that decide the build-vs-buy question.
